code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing
        mut c = 0
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(v)
          c = v
        when None
          c = 0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      end
      let value = num * sign
      if value > 0
        total = total + value
      else if value < 0
        total = total - value
      end
    end
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
